data.narrative:
Raphe mPhibr is a Series B-stage company in Defense & Security that has raised $145M+ to date. The comparable universe consists of six private peers at the same stage and sector, supplemented by two public defense contractors (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) for market context. Private comps include Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, Harmattan AI, Castelion, and Defense Unicorns, valued between $1.0B and $1.5B.

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression uses the $145M total raised as a valuation proxy, applying a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B advancement, yielding $276M. The peer-median method anchors to the median valuation of six same-sector, same-stage comparables at $1.2B, with a range spanning $1.0B to $1.5B. This reflects the elevated valuation multiples observed across contemporary defense-tech Series B financings.

The triangulated analysis implies a valuation range of $234M (low) to $1.4B (high), with a median of $738M. The wide spread reflects material uncertainty: the stage-progression method substantially underweights the peer set, which commands significantly higher multiples. Key uncertainties include revenue scale and growth trajectory relative to named comps, customer concentration and contract durability in defense markets, and broader investor sentiment in the defense-tech sector. A narrower range would require additional revenue and margin data.
